datasets.name: 7b732535
queryLines:
-- Updated coach profile query with new layout
WITH p AS (
  SELECT
    cp.coach_id,
    cp.coach_name,
    cp.nation_name_display,
    cp.flag_emoji,
    cp.games_played_all,
    cp.wins,
    cp.draws,
    cp.losses,
    cp.tournaments_played,
    cp.nations_played,
    cp.opponents_count,
    cp.active_since_year,
    cp.last_active_year,
    cp.global_elo_current,
    cp.global_elo_peak_last_50,
    cp.global_elo_median_all,
    cp.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted,
    cp.world_rank_current,
    cp.nation_rank_current,
    cp.world_rank_peak,
    cp.nation_rank_peak,
    cp.selector_rank_national,
    cp.selector_rank_global,
    cp.main_race_name,
    cp.main_race_games_played,
    cp.main_race_ppg,
    cp.median_race_ppg,
    cp.best_win_streak,
    cp.current_win_streak,
    cp.best_unbeaten_streak,
    cp.current_unbeaten_streak,
    cp.load_timestamp
  FROM
    naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile cp
),
race_stats AS (
  SELECT
    coach_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT race_id) AS distinct_races_played
  FROM
    naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance
  WHERE
    race_id <> 0
    AND games_played > 0
  GROUP BY
    coach_id
),
last_50_stats AS (
  SELECT
    h.coach_id,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 1.0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_wins,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.5 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_draws,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN h.result_numeric = 0.0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS last50_losses
  FROM
    (
      SELECT
        coach_id,
        result_numeric,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY coach_id ORDER BY game_index DESC) AS rn
      FROM
        naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_history
      WHERE
        rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
    ) h
      CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
          CAST(last_n_games_window AS INT) AS n
        FROM
          naf_catalog.gold_dim.analytical_config
      ) cfg
  WHERE
    h.rn <= cfg.n
  GROUP BY
    h.coach_id
  HAVING
    COUNT(*) >= MAX(cfg.n)
),
p2 AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    COALESCE(rs.distinct_races_played, 0) AS distinct_races_played,
    l50.last50_wins,
    l50.last50_draws,
    l50.last50_losses
  FROM
    p
      LEFT JOIN race_stats rs
        ON p.coach_id = rs.coach_id
      LEFT JOIN last_50_stats l50
        ON p.coach_id = l50.coach_id
)
SELECT
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order,
  row.label,
  row.profile,
  p2.load_timestamp
FROM
  p2
  LATERAL VIEW
    explode(
      array(
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          1,
          'label',
          '👤 NAF Name',
          'profile',
          coalesce(p2.coach_name, 'Unknown coach')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          2,
          'label',
          '🔢 NAF Number',
          'profile',
          cast(p2.coach_id as string)
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          3,
          'label',
          '🌍 Nation',
          'profile',
          concat(coalesce(p2.flag_emoji, '🌐'), ' ', coalesce(p2.nation_name_display, 'Unknown'))
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 10, 'label', '📊 Overview', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          11,
          'label',
          ' • Total games (all)',
          'profile',
          concat(
            cast(p2.games_played_all as string),
            ' (',
            cast(p2.wins as string),
            '/',
            cast(p2.draws as string),
            '/',
            cast(p2.losses as string),
            ')'
          )
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          12,
          'label',
          ' • Last 50 games (W/D/L)',
          'profile',
          CASE
            WHEN
              p2.last50_wins IS NOT NULL
            THEN
              concat(
                cast(p2.last50_wins as string),
                '/',
                cast(p2.last50_draws as string),
                '/',
                cast(p2.last50_losses as string)
              )
            ELSE 'N/A'
          END
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          13,
          'label',
          ' • Tournaments',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.tournaments_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          14,
          'label',
          ' • Nations played',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.nations_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          15,
          'label',
          ' • Opponents faced',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.opponents_count as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          16,
          'label',
          ' • Active since / Last active years',
          'profile',
          concat(cast(p2.active_since_year as string), ' / ', cast(p2.last_active_year as string))
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 20, 'label', '📈 Ratings', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          21,
          'label',
          ' • Current GLO',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_current, 1) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          22,
          'label',
          ' • Peak GLO (last 50)',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_last_50, 1) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          23,
          'label',
          ' • Median GLO',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_median_all, 1) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          24,
          'label',
          ' • Opp median GLO (weighted)',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.opponent_global_elo_median_weighted, 1) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          25,
          'label',
          ' • World rank (current) / Nation rank (current)',
          'profile',
          concat(
            cast(p2.world_rank_current as string),
            ' / ',
            cast(p2.nation_rank_current as string)
          )
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          26,
          'label',
          ' • World rank (peak) / Nation rank (peak)',
          'profile',
          concat(cast(p2.world_rank_peak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.nation_rank_peak as string))
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 30, 'label', '🛡 Favourite race', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          31,
          'label',
          ' • Race',
          'profile',
          coalesce(p2.main_race_name, 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          32,
          'label',
          ' • Games with race',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.main_race_games_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          33,
          'label',
          ' • Race PPG',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.main_race_ppg, 2) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          34,
          'label',
          ' • Distinct races played',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(p2.distinct_races_played as string), '0')
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          35,
          'label',
          ' • Median race PPG',
          'profile',
          coalesce(cast(round(p2.median_race_ppg, 2) as string), 'N/A')
        ),
        named_struct('sort_order', 40, 'label', '🔥 Streaks', 'profile', ''),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          41,
          'label',
          ' • Best win / Current win',
          'profile',
          concat(cast(p2.best_win_streak as string), ' / ', cast(p2.current_win_streak as string))
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          42,
          'label',
          ' • Best unbeaten / Current unbeaten',
          'profile',
          concat(
            cast(p2.best_unbeaten_streak as string),
            ' / ',
            cast(p2.current_unbeaten_streak as string)
          )
        ),
        named_struct(
          'sort_order',
          43,
          'label',
          '🏆 Selector rank',
          'profile',
          CASE
            WHEN
              p2.selector_rank_national IS NOT NULL
            THEN
              CONCAT(
                '#',
                CAST(p2.selector_rank_national AS STRING),
                ' (Nation) / #',
                CAST(p2.selector_rank_global AS STRING),
                ' (Global)'
              )
            ELSE 'N/A'
          END
        )
      )
    ) e
    AS row
ORDER BY
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order;

datasets.name: 7e6b0b4b
queryLines:
-- DASHBOARD DATASET: coach_cumulative_results_daily_series (contract-aligned)
-- Source contract: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  event_day,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
WHERE scope = 'GLOBAL'
  AND race_id = 0
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: f9e6a4b3
queryLines:
SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_last_n_daily_series
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: 92b53229
queryLines:
-- QUERY: Overall results (dashboard dataset)
SELECT
  coach_id,
  level,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_results_all_long
ORDER BY coach_id, level, result;

datasets.name: a59b382e
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_race_performance (dashboard dataset)
-- Top races by games played, with optional race filter.
-- PARAMS: :min_games INT, :max_races INT (default 6)

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(COALESCE(:min_games, 0) AS INT) AS min_games,
    CAST(COALESCE(:max_races, 6) AS INT) AS max_races
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    crp.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY crp.coach_id
      ORDER BY crp.games_played DESC, crp.race_id ASC
    ) AS race_rank
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance AS crp
  CROSS JOIN params AS p
  WHERE COALESCE(crp.games_played, 0) >= p.min_games
    AND crp.race_id <> 0
)
SELECT * EXCEPT (last_game_event_timestamp), CAST(last_game_event_timestamp AS DATE) AS last_game_date
FROM ranked
CROSS JOIN params AS p
WHERE race_rank <= p.max_races
ORDER BY coach_id, games_played DESC, race_id;

datasets.name: 52345e69
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  game_week,
  glo_weekly,
  glo_running_peak,
  glo_running_median
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
ORDER BY coach_id, game_week;

datasets.name: 7287b5e0
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  race_id,
  race_name,
  game_week,
  elo_weekly,
  race_rank_by_games
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_elo_rating_daily_series
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
  AND (:start_date IS NULL OR game_week >= CAST(:start_date AS DATE))
  AND (:end_date IS NULL OR game_week <= CAST(:end_date AS DATE))
  AND race_rank_by_games <= CAST(COALESCE(:max_races, 6) AS INT)
ORDER BY coach_id, race_name, game_week;

datasets.name: 3660cd57
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_opponent_insights (dashboard dataset)
-- PURPOSE: Per-coach opponent insights table for dashboards (strength + outcomes vs opponents)
-- OUTPUT GRAIN: One row per (coach_id, category, opponent_coach_id)
-- SOURCE CONTRACT: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights
SELECT
  *,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(games_played AS STRING),
    '(',
    CAST(wins AS STRING),
    '/',
    CAST(draws AS STRING),
    '/',
    CAST(losses AS STRING),
    ')'
  ) AS games_wdl
FROM
  naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights

datasets.name: 15dbc912
queryLines:
SELECT coach_id, bin_index, bin_label, opponents_count, games_played, wins, draws, losses, win_points, win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.coach_opponent_median_glo_bin_summary
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: f732672a
queryLines:
SELECT coach_id, bin_index, category, result, result_order, value, result_pct
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_median_glo_bin_results_long
ORDER BY bin_index, result_order
